horoscope: With the current Sun cycle, you may be taking action on issues surrounding how to secure yourself, dear Aries. You're motivated to use your natural talents and better use your resources. You could also be accumulating more things if that's what makes sense to you now. When the Sun is strained here, you may be inclined to overdo, overspend, or obsess over your means and material things. For the most part, however, it's a good time to get yourself into a more secure, practical, and patient headspace. Material affairs and comfort issues are in stronger focus. Today, you can have a way of bringing elements of the past, such as accumulated wisdom or your own heritage, to current projects and activities in a positive, supportive manner. With the Moon's move into your solar fourth house, you're inclined to attend to your domestic and personal needs.

With the Sun currently transiting your sign, dear Taurus, your personal needs, plans, and presentation are on the front burner. People tend to follow your lead or step aside and let you be. Generally speaking, it's a time to seize the day, to shape your life as you'd like it to be, and to be heard, noticed, and counted. Still, Mercury will continue to transit your private solar twelfth house until early May, and you're not sharing all just yet. This is nevertheless a time of revitalization. You're particularly noticeable and coming across with more personal strength at this time. Today can be lively for ideas, communications, and connecting. You're putting more imagination into your communications, and you can be especially absorbed in various diversions and personal interests.

The Sun is now transiting your privacy and soul sector, dear Gemini, where it will stay until May 20th. You may be harder to reach or need extra downtime. This is a period of rest and physical and emotional replenishment. While it's not ideal for pushing yourself or your plans, it's essential for getting your bearings and reflecting upon recent events, conditions, and feelings. You might be closing matters that have run their natural course, and you're inclined to instinctively withdraw from the hustle and bustle of daily life as you get to know yourself, your goals, and your needs a little more intimately. Efforts towards building something worthwhile and long-term can be very rewarding and attractive to you today. The Moon leaves your sign, and your emotions become steadier as you begin to fill up with more patience. You're more inclined to play it safe on an emotional level, and this is an important exercise as you work on making your life more comfortable and secure, even in small ways.

With the Sun in your social sector until May 20th, you can feel subtly supported, dear Cancer. You can be quite focused on new beginnings, projects, and ideas, and you can feel hopeful about where your life may be heading. If not, this is a time to experiment with new ideas and plans, or to dream up visions of where you'd like to go with your life in general. There can be increased focus on social activities, teamwork, friendships, group connections, and the community. You may more often share your talents or know-how with groups, friends, and associates. This transit is pulling you out of the career and life-plan focus that you've had for many weeks, and it stirs your need for more humanitarian, free-spirited activities. Today, with the Moon's move into your sign, you'll feel more get-up-and-go. It's a time to acknowledge feelings you may have set aside recently, but the day's energies favor channeling emotions in constructive, helpful ways. No longer content to take the back seat, you are ready to take action.

The solar cycle you're currently in emphasizes your career and public life, dear Leo. During this cycle, you put more pride and heart into your professional or social standing and your ability to meet your responsibilities. Doing this part of life well will be more satisfying than usual. Now and in the weeks ahead, you experience a stronger need or desire to perform well, set goals, and get back on track. Expect higher demands on you at this time of year, both personally and professionally. Despite this power theme, you're still riding on the energy of the recent New Moon as well as the spotlight on your spirit sector. As such, it's a time when you are dividing your time well. The Moon leaves your social sector and becomes a guest in your privacy sector today, and it's a signal from the cosmos to take things easy, or easier than you have been recently, in order to catch your breath. Thoughts of work or larger life plan goals remain, but this is more about letting your mind wander rather than mapping things out in definite terms.

The Sun is currently transiting your solar ninth house, dear Virgo, stirring your desire to experience life beyond the ordinary routine. It's a great time of year for exploring new ideas and venturing out into unknown territory. This cycle brings your needs for life experience, learning, and excitement to the fore. While routine matters need your attention, this is an important time to branch out and mix things up a little. Anything that expands your understanding of the world around you appeals greatly now, and this theme only becomes stronger in the coming weeks. It's an excellent cycle in which to lift yourself above your usual routines, even in little ways, so that you can better consider the bigger picture. Pressures to perform tend to ease today, and you can feel motivated to reach out to others. You're gravitating to lighter, pressure-free connections for a couple of days.

With the current Sun cycle, there's a stronger focus on emotional or material support in your life, dear Libra, as well as a focus on power dynamics in close relationships and personal development within. There may be a need for deeper connections to people or projects now. You have the chance to make lasting improvements to your life. It can be a superb time for exploring a particular topic of interest in more depth. During this cycle, which lasts until May 20th, you're more interested in digging deep than skimming the surface. The Sun is now shining its light on some of the things that are typically hidden from view, and you stand to learn a lot about your inner workings, motivations, and desires. Your private world assumes more importance. Today, you may learn of an interesting strategy for finance and business. You're more aware than usual of the impact you're making on others, as well as the image you're projecting. While this might generate some self-consciousness on other days, today your confidence opens up doors.

You're in a Sun cycle that's often about coming to a more balanced state of being, dear Scorpio. In the process, you're gaining a larger perspective on what you need and want from your life. There can be a stronger focus on companionship or partnerships these days and in the weeks ahead, and you can certainly benefit from the insights of a significant other. Some of your personal plans may need refinement, or you may be putting less energy into them as you attend to other areas of life, particularly social ones. You're taking more pride in a partnership, or perhaps a partnership demands more attention than usual. You're more willing than usual to adjust and adapt to the needs of key people in your life. Today, the Moon moves into a sister Water sign, and you can feel a stronger desire to get out and experience life. This is less about restlessness than simply a need to feed your spirit, as you're likely to be feeling quite at peace with yourself. There can be valuable feedback and appreciation from others, which only serves to reinforce this feeling.

In the current Sun cycle, dear Sagittarius, you're more invested in getting on top of your daily affairs. It's a time for improving your work, health, and daily routines. You'll want to take charge of your duties and chores and make changes if necessary. You'll find extra motivation to organize your daily routines and work environment, and to pursue wellness. It's a busy time, although granted, not the most glamorous time of year. There is a nice feeling of balance and order to the energies of today that suits your nature well. You're motivated to do something positive and supportive today, and you're likely to focus on domestic harmony. You're not afraid to commit to something today, especially if it fills you with a sense of purpose.

With the current Sun cycle, good energy and inspiration are with you for creative efforts, special relationships, and love, dear Capricorn. Emotionally, you are inspired and motivated to express yourself in unique ways. You might pay more attention to personal hobbies or recreation and entertainment now and in the weeks ahead. During this self-expressive period, you thrive on others' feedback and good vibes, and you are more openly affectionate and playful. To help this transit along, you might consider tuning into your needs for entertainment, self-expression, romance, hobbies, and creative outlets. Your urge to create and share is powerful. With the Moon entering your solar seventh today, you're even more interested in establishing balance in your life than usual. You might decide to work on a project with someone special or pursue a long-term project.

You're in a Sun cycle that's good for family activities, home improvement, and improving your feelings of safety, security, and comfort, dear Aquarius. During this period, strong reminders of your roots, home life, and loved ones motivate you. The focus is on your closest ties, your foundation, your support system, or your home life. It's a natural time for anchoring and nesting on a psychological level. It's certainly not the most adventurous or outgoing cycle in the Sun's journey through your solar chart, but it's favorable for a sense of identity, comfort, and self-knowledge. Today, you're drawn to noncompetitive or quiet activities that increase your sense of being grounded and secure. You can be enthusiastic about organizing or sorting through areas of your home or work.

You're currently in a Sun cycle of increased curiosity, learning, and mental activity, dear Pisces. It's a time to try out new ideas, learn new things, develop current studies and interests, and reach out to others to stay in touch. In your daily life, you are likely to experience more communication, movement, and overall activity. You'll find it a particularly good time for taking up new studies or interests, as well as for sharing your ideas with others. It's a time for keeping up (or catching up) with others, as well as for dabbling in various projects or otherwise putting your feelers out for new ideas. With the Moon moving into your self-expressive solar fifth house today, in harmony with your sign, you're likely to feel more confident and positive. You're getting your message across without disclaimers or wordiness.
